titleStmt.title: SII 31.150: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 150. (A.R. No. B 3 of 1937.) ŚRĪRANGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK AND DISTRICT, TAMIL NADU.

summary.p: On the slab (No. III) built into the pavement on the east side of the first prākāra in the temple of Ranganāthasvāmi.
It is dated in the cyclic year Prabhava (worng for Vibhava), Āshāḍha, śu. 5, Friday, corresponding to June 22, Friday, 1688 A.D.

Records the gift of two villages Iśanakūru and Nāṇakūru to one Śrīnivāsayya to meet the expenses of worship and sahasranāmārchana and yamunārchakam and also kīrīṭa (?) daily to the god for the merit of Muddummagāru, Queen of Śrīrangakṛishṇa Mudduvīrappanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: (Published in South Indaia Inscription Volume XXIV. Ins. No. 557 and 558 pp. 539-540.)

prabhavasaṁvatsaraṁ Āṣāḍha śu
dha paṁcami śukravāraṁ śrīraṁgga
kṛṣṇamuddu vīrappanāyanayya
vāri dēvulaina muddummagāri vu
bhayamugānu śrīraṁgganāya
kulaku Arakaṭṭaḍa rāmāṁjakūṭā
nki śrīnivāsaya cēta dhārāpūrva
kamugānu kaṭṭaḍa śēśina Iśanaku
ranāṇakura grāmaṁ raṁḍunnu śā
śvatamugānu dharmaṁ naḍipiṁccu
ka vaccēdi
I śāśanakramānaku nityamu
gānu raṁgganāyakulanu Ārā
dhana cēśi sahasrināmā¨rccana ḷā
yamani A¨rccakaṁ naṁperumāḷe
yyavāriki sottaṁtramu
gā ka¨rṭṭaṁ śēśināraṁ ganaka
putrapautra pāraṁparyā
nakunnu vārē śēsukavaccēdi .
Digital edition of SII 31.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
